title: So until the next Rebuild
wikitext:
[]: So until the next Rebuild...             Quote Post by cd603 » Sun Dec 05, 2010 11:35 pm What have you guys been up to? I mean to pass the time. Yeah I know most of you have re-watched the series and movies a couple of times, but other than that, what else have you done? I recently finished Samurai Champloo, and I've gotta say that actually took my mind off Evangelion for a bit. But I realize I'm probably talking to a blank wall here so...yell at me...please...

[]:             Quote Post by skikes » Sun Dec 05, 2010 11:40 pm I find this thread offensive. ...Wanna go fool around?

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sun Dec 05, 2010 11:42 pm Well, for most of us, Evangelion isn't the end all, be all of our existence, and I'm sure we're not dying with anticipation whenever we can't get our dose of Eva. So, really, we all just do whatever. I have my blog, my job, my schooling, and friends to pass the time. If I'm in the mood I'll watch anime or go on a video game binge. Yeah, this question is pretty much asking, "what do you do when you're not a cowboy robot riding a t-rex that shoots lasers?"

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Dec 05, 2010 11:44 pm There's like a billion other things out there. There's certainly plenty of new Eva shit coming out. There's Gakuen Datenroku/Campus Apocalypse and Ikari Shinji Ikusei Keikaku/Shinji Ikari Raising Project. There's also the Petit Eva CGI shorts, hopefully Sadamoto's Evangelion manga will continue in the coming months. I've also been collecting a lot of Eva stuff lately, and I'm preparing a number of panels for a slew of upcoming conventions. I already have confirmation from Ohayocon. Beyond Evangelion, I've been collecting old video game stuff, revisiting favorites from my childhood. I rectified having never beat Metroid. I also replayed The Legend of Zelda as well. I've been going on and off with a Final Fantasy IX campaign for months. I get distracted from it every time I get a new game.

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Sun Dec 05, 2010 11:49 pm Sachi wrote: Well, for most of us, Evangelion isn't the end all, be all of our existence, and I'm sure we're not dying with anticipation whenever we can't get our dose of Eva. So, really, we all just do whatever. I have my blog, my job, my schooling, and friends to pass the time. If I'm in the mood I'll watch anime or go on a video game binge. Yeah, this question is pretty much asking, "what do you do when you're not a cowboy robot riding a t-rex that shoots lasers?"

[]:             Quote Post by cd603 » Sun Dec 05, 2010 11:52 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Beyond Evangelion, I've been collecting old video game stuff, revisiting favorites from my childhood. I rectified having never beat Metroid. I also replayed The Legend of Zelda as well. I've been going on and off with a Final Fantasy IX campaign for months. I get distracted from it every time I get a new game.

[]:             Quote Post by Lucretius » Mon Dec 06, 2010 12:20 am Man, I don't know how I'll pass the time until the next Star Wars prequel comes out. :/

[]:             Quote Post by Fireball » Mon Dec 06, 2010 1:19 am go out. fancy that!

[]:             Quote Post by ran1 » Mon Dec 06, 2010 1:41 am fuck bitches and get money, mostly. It's a hard knock life.

[]:             Quote Post by shinji_ryoji_89 » Mon Dec 06, 2010 1:56 am Eva related? Replaying episodes of Petit Eva from time to time and currently, I'm watching NGE again from start to finish and I intend to watch the last two episodes and The End of Evangelion repeatedly and in different orders. I also want to rewatch 1.11 and 2.22. Other than that, well, on my last week of school and work before winter break. Very busy writing both for school and a comics contest that I want to get myself into. And then I plan to write more. I'm beginning to edit a short film I made a couple of weeks ago. I'm hoping to catch up on Mad Men after only watching the first season two years ago. I plan to watch some other TV shows I've missed and also tons of anime and movies. I hope to go out with friends and family. And then go back to school. I hope to fall in love at some point too, or at least go out on dates with a girl or more. Maybe make more short films or act in a play or something. Read all the books I want to read. Yeah, there is a lot of stuff I will do and could do between now and the time the next Rebuild film comes out.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Mon Dec 06, 2010 2:01 am ran1 wrote: fuck bitches and get money, mostly.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Dec 06, 2010 2:18 am ran1 wrote: fuck bitches

[]:             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Mon Dec 06, 2010 4:17 am i'm pretty occupied enough where the wait for 3.0 wouldn't be a problem I got my fanfics (AV and Requiem), my Rebuild 2.22 fan edit (sorry, can't tell ya what it is, you have to see when its released), my much delayed return to YTP making, my to-be-written original works, a few RPs and of course, the unpredictable blessing/curse that is life to take hold of me, as well as playing games I got, my delayed re-watching of EVA/EoE (subbed this time around), several movies I own that I have not watched, me needing to take my GED, possibly watch more anime, more horror films, do my "Get drunk, watch 'A Serbian Film' and record the audio of my drunk commentary on it" project and plenty more so yeah, i'm pretty busy at the moment...in a sort of slacker way

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Mon Dec 06, 2010 5:57 am I do absolutely nothing in my free time because I'm highly anticipating the next Evangelion film. I spend most of my time clinging on to my Rei body pillow and Misato blow up doll, telling them my deepest secrets. Whenever I'm not clinging on to my inanimate lovers, I pleasure myself to the EvaGeeks wiki. Other times I'm scouring the net for Eva merch and worship Anno-senpai.

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Mon Dec 06, 2010 7:07 am I suspend myself criogenically between the release of each movie, because I cannot endure one fleeting moment of consciousness without having new Evangelion material to consummate. During my sleep, an A.I. post on this board on my behalf, including this reply.

[]:             Quote Post by C.A.P. » Mon Dec 06, 2010 5:44 pm The same thing I do every day cd603. Try to take over the world.

[]: My life in a nutshell. Deal with it. *sips coffee*             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Mon Dec 06, 2010 6:20 pm I'm tracking down various hard-to-find Eva merch, writing fanfiction, watching Lost, dicking around EGF, re-watching both Rebuild movies over and over again, learning Japanese... And occassionally I'll masturbate.

[]:             Quote Post by cd603 » Mon Dec 06, 2010 6:53 pm C.A.P. wrote: The same thing I do every day cd603. Try to take over the world.

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Mon Dec 06, 2010 6:54 pm I sell stuff on ebay for myself and others. :)

[]:             Quote Post by Nightweaver20xx » Mon Dec 06, 2010 7:06 pm Gainax will never, ever, EVER let you lose touch with Eva. Even if you WANT to. It's just too valuable a franchise for them. One thing I have totally no complaint about as an Eva fan is my access to source material, tangental material, fan material, toys, games, ephemera and merchandise. IT'S FUCKING EVERYWHERE. >:3 Yu can [not] haz cheezburger

Article: So until the next Rebuild
'm watching NGE again from start to finish and I intend to watch the last two episodes and The End of Evangelion repeatedly and in different orders. I also want to rewatch 1.11 and 2.22. Other than that, well, on my last week of school and work before winter break. Very busy writing both for school and a comics contest that I want to get myself into. And then I plan to write more. I'm beginning to edit a short film I made a couple of weeks ago. I'm hoping to catch up on Mad Men after only watching the first season two years ago. I plan to watch some other TV shows I've missed and also tons of anime and movies. I hope to go out with friends and family. And then go back to school. I hope to fall in love at some point too, or at least go out on dates with a girl or more. Maybe make more short films or act in a play or something. Read all the books I want to read. Yeah, there is a lot of stuff I will do and could do between now and the time the next Rebuild film comes out.
